name: axes-area
description: Area chart with multiple series and visible axes for data comparison

xAxisData.name: xAxisData
xAxisData.description: X-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar'] or [{label: 'Jan', value: 0}, {label: 'Feb', value: 1}]

yAxisData.name: yAxisData
yAxisData.description: Y-axis labels. Can be a string array or object array with label and value. Example: ['0', '50', '100'] or [{label: 'Low', value: 0}, {label: 'High', value: 100}]

data.name: data
data.description: Array of numeric values for the chart data. Example: [100, 200, 150, 300]

width.name: width
width.description: Width of the chart in pixels. Example: 220

height.name: height
height.description: Height of the chart in pixels. Example: 350

theme.name: theme
theme.description: Partial theme override for customizing chart appearance. Example: {series: [{color: '#3b82f6'}]}
